# Ellcworth Express

> UK freight forwarder specialising in the UK-to-West Africa shipping corridor. Container (FCL/LCL), RoRo vehicle shipping, air freight, and secure document shipping from the UK to Ghana, Nigeria, Sierra Leone, Kenya, and Cote d'Ivoire. In operation 15+ years, serving individual customers, businesses, universities, hospitals, NGOs, and government bodies.

Ellcworth Express Ltd (registered in England and Wales) manages end-to-end freight from UK collection or depot drop-off, through export documentation and customs clearance at destination, to port-to-door delivery via local agent networks in each destination country.

## Destinations

- [Ghana](https://www.ellcworth.com/destinations/ghana): FCL/LCL container shipping, RoRo vehicle shipping (from GBP750), air freight to Accra. Tema Port. ICUMS customs clearance.
- [Nigeria](https://www.ellcworth.com/destinations/nigeria): FCL/LCL container shipping, RoRo vehicle shipping (from GBP950), air freight to Lagos. Apapa Port. Form M and Nigeria Customs Service clearance.
- [Sierra Leone](https://www.ellcworth.com/destinations/sierra-leone): FCL/LCL container shipping, air freight to Freetown. Queen Elizabeth II Quay. Cotecna pre-shipment inspection and NRA customs clearance.
- [Kenya](https://www.ellcworth.com/destinations/kenya): FCL/LCL container shipping, air freight to Mombasa/Nairobi.
- [Cote d'Ivoire](https://www.ellcworth.com/destinations/cote-divoire): FCL/LCL container shipping and air freight.

## Services

- [All services](https://www.ellcworth.com/services): Container shipping (FCL/LCL), RoRo vehicle shipping, air freight, secure document shipping, repack and consolidation, JIT (just-in-time) delivery, export and customs support, warehousing.
- [Institutional shipping](https://www.ellcworth.com/institutional): Freight and secure document services for universities, hospitals, government bodies, NGOs, and faith-based organisations shipping to West Africa.

## Company

- [About](https://www.ellcworth.com/about): Company background and experience.
- [Insights](https://www.ellcworth.com/insights): Articles on shipping processes, customs procedures, and institutional logistics for the UK-to-West Africa corridor.
- [Get a quote](https://www.ellcworth.com/#quote): Online quote form, returned within 24 hours.
